content.en:
Not long after, a group of Supreme Void Demons came to this fortress, and saw that all the Supreme Void Demons here were dead, and even His Highness the Flowing Teeth was gone.

Subsequently, they deduced and learned a result.

His Highness Flowing Tooth is dead!

Soon, the news spread back to the Baxue Bloodline, and the Baxue Vein was immediately furious.

And Ye Tian, the initiator, had already brought the corpse of the flowing teeth to the innate origin domain where the Su people were located - the Su domain!

This innate origin domain belongs to the entire Sioux tribe, all living beings are Sioux bloodline, and all non-Sioux creatures have been moved to other innate origin domains.

With the entire innate original domain to reproduce the population of the Sioux tribe, it can be imagined how terrifying the population of the Sioux is, plus the Sioux people have too many resources at their disposal, and they have continued to develop over countless years, and one by one the demonic geniuses have risen.

That's why the Sioux are so prosperous today.

Knowing the situation of the Sioux Clan, Ye Tian also wanted to emulate the Sioux Clan, maybe in the future, he would also use the Wuji Domain as the territory of the Terran Race, and the other creatures would move out.

Sioux Domain.

Ye Tian couldn't get in, but he was staying at the No. 1 fortress outside the Su Domain.

In the entire periphery of the Su Domain, there are a total of six fortresses, which are only attached to the Su Domain, enveloping the entire Su Domain, and these fortresses only protect the Su Domain.

And the supreme realm guarding these fortresses all comes from the Su Domain, and outsiders cannot control these fortresses.

As a result, it is almost impossible for Su Yu to have any problems.

Su Yu No. 1 Fortress, Ye Tian waited for a while, and a Ninefold Dao Realm appeared, and it was the Ninefold Dao Realm who issued the task, Su Tianchen, the Dove Star Sword Master.

"I've seen the Dove Star Knife Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"You're Ye Tian, did you really kill the Flowing Fang?" the Dove Star Knife Master doubted.

So many Sixfold Dao Realm teams can't kill the Flowing Teeth, and Ye Tian can do it alone?

Wow!

Ye Tian directly took out the body of the flowing tooth.

When the Dove Star Knife Master saw it, he immediately recognized that this was indeed a real flowing tooth, and he was secretly surprised.

"Very good, you completed the task, reward, I will give it to you!" said the Dove Star Knife.

At this moment, Ye Tian said: "Dove Star Knife Master, can the sixth sequence of the Supreme Dao Rule item be exchanged for the Supreme Dao Spirit Essence or Crimson Blood Gold?"

When the Dove Star Knife Master heard this, he probably understood.

Ye Tian must have comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, and he didn't want the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule items, he just wanted to exchange them for the Supreme Dao Spirit Essence or Crimson Blood Gold, and wanted to refine the Blood Spirit Liquid.

He didn't refuse, and said: "I don't have the essence of the Dao Spirit, I don't need this thing, but I can exchange some from the clan, and there is also red blood gold, I can also get some for you." "

"Thank you, Dove Star Knife Master!"

Ye Tian didn't expect a task, and directly gathered the materials.

It didn't take long for the Dove Star Knife Master to bring three materials.

100 pieces of blood stone, 20 pieces of red blood gold.

However, the supreme spiritual essence is not a real spiritual essence, but a piece of wood, and it is extremely tough, and Ye Tian can't crush it.

"Lord Dove Star Sword, is this thing the essence of the Supreme Dao?" Ye Tian asked.

"Naturally not!" The Dove Star Knife said: "This is the Supreme Dao Spiritual Root, the Supreme Dao Spiritual Essence is the substance extracted from it, you can find a Ninefold Dao Realm who comprehends the rules of the Fifth Sequence of the Dao to extract the Dao Spiritual Essence, extracting this thing is a waste of time, I don't have time to extract it, you can find the Ninefold Dao Realm to extract it yourself!"

After saying that, the Dove Star Knife Master left.

After all, the task was completed and the reward was given, so he didn't care about Ye Tian.

......

After leaving the No. 1 Fortress of Suyu, Ye Tian returned to the Winter Night Fortress.

Here, he took out the Supreme Dao Spiritual Root.

"The Dove Star Knife Master probably thinks that I can't find the Ninefold Dao Realm to extract the Dao Spirit Essence, but I can extract it myself!" Ye Tian said with a smile.

The Su Clan's Dove Star Sword Master was still a little stingy, he didn't believe that the other party couldn't come up with the true Dao Spirit Essence, he just didn't want to cheapen him for nothing.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance developed the Blood Spirit Liquid formula, but it strictly controlled the materials, and it didn't want to cultivate the following Supreme Dao Realm.

That is, he became a full member to get such an opportunity, otherwise he would not even have a chance.

With the materials and getting them together, Ye Tian began to refine the blood spirit liquid.

The years passed.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully refined the Supreme Blood Spirit Liquid.

One serving!

Two copies!

Three copies!

Unconsciously, Ye Tian refined three hundred parts of the blood spirit liquid, and only then did he run out of materials.

"Try it!"

Ye Tian swallowed the first blood spirit liquid in one gulp, and terrifying energy poured into his body, refining his body and improving his cultivation.

The effect of such an improvement is much better than absorbing the gift of refining the origin of heaven and earth.

One after another of the Supreme Blood Spiritual Liquid was absorbed and refined by Ye Tian, and his cultivation was also improving rapidly.

After consuming ninety-nine pieces of the Extreme Blood Spirit Liquid, Ye Tian's cultivation had reached the peak of the early stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm, and he was only one step away from the middle stage of the Sixfold Dao Realm.

So, he shocked the realm a little.

Rumble!!!

Cultivation is a breakthrough, reaching the late stage of the sixfold Dao realm.

"There are still more than two hundred copies of the Supreme Blood Spirit Liquid left, which should be able to raise my cultivation to the Sixfold Dao Realm Late Stage!" Ye Tian said darkly.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian had been refining to the blood spirit liquid, and his cultivation had steadily improved.

And the Winter Night Fortress, the retreat place of the Lord of the Su Ya Su Domain.

At this moment, she is at a critical moment.

She's impacting the Ninefold Dao Realm!

Long before, she had used the fifth-sequence supreme rule items given by the Sioux clan, and had successfully comprehended a trace of the fifth-sequence supreme rules.

Then, she began to work hard to impact the Ninefold Dao Realm.

During the whole process, she didn't mention it to the other Supreme Dao Realms.

This time, she used all the resources she had prepared for countless years, and many resource treasures that helped the impact, as long as she could increase the slightest opportunity, she would not let it go.

Comprehending the rules of the fifth sequence of the Supreme Dao can break through to become the Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm, but it does not mean that it is a 100% breakthrough, once the breakthrough fails, her foundation will be damaged, and she will not be able to continue to break through for a long time, and she needs to wait for recovery before she can continue to impact.

And when the catastrophe came, she didn't have time to strike a second time.

So, this time she has to break through and succeed.

Once successful, she will be a very top existence in the Nine Folds Dao Realm, and her status among the Sioux will be even higher, and it will be easy to survive the tribulation.

After a long time.

Su Ya's bottleneck is crumbling.

Click!

The bottleneck was finally shattered in the Fifth Sequence of Dao rules and the assistance of many resources.

Rumble!!!!!

Su Ya's cultivation was breaking through, and the vision was transmitted to the entire Winter Night Fortress, and even to the Void Domain.

Countless energies poured into her body, and such movements attracted the attention of countless Dao Realms.

Ye Tian also stopped cultivating and came to the outside of the mansion to watch this vision.

"Is this the Su Domain Lord breaking through?"

Ye Tian guessed.
